en_title: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners Was a Tearjerker, But One Writer Says It Almost Had 'Even Worse Endings'
cn_title: 《赛博朋克：边缘行者》编剧透露原本有更惨结局
subtitle: 原定结局更刀
opus_summary: 据编剧Bartosz Sztybor透露，《赛博朋克：边缘行者》原定结局更惨：大卫没死透，而是被荒坂改造成机器人，扔到非洲或南美的企业战场上。第二季正在制作，6月29日或有更多消息。

paragraphs.en: Cyberpunk: Edgerunners almost featured a different and "even worse" ending than the one it got, according to writer Bartosz Sztybor.
paragraphs.cn: 据编剧Bartosz Sztybor透露，《赛博朋克：边缘行者》原本几乎采用了一个与播出结局不同，甚至「更惨」的结局。

paragraphs.en: The writer behind Studio Trigger and CD Projekt Red's acclaimed Cyberpunk 2077 anime spin-off spoke about how Season 1's already bleak story could have had fans shedding more tears during a conversation with Anime Corner . In an excerpt from the full, yet-to-be-released interview, Sztybor teased that the ending of David and Lucy's story was almost more tragic than the one we got when the show came to Netflix 2022.
paragraphs.cn: 这位板机社与CDPR联手打造、广受好评的《赛博朋克2077》衍生动画的编剧，在接受Anime Corner采访时表示，第一季本就阴暗的故事本可以让粉丝流下更多泪水。在尚未完整发布的访谈节选中，Sztybor透露，大卫和露西的故事结局，比2022年该剧登陆Netflix时我们看到的版本更为悲惨。

paragraphs.en: Warning! Spoilers for Cyberpunk: Edgerunners follow...
paragraphs.cn: 警告！以下包含《赛博朋克：边缘行者》剧透……

paragraphs.en: "There was never a happy ending. There were even worse endings," Sztybor said. "There was one ending in which David doesn't die entirely. Arasaka gets him and he ends up fighting in Africa or South America in corporate wars as a robot."
paragraphs.cn: 「从来没有过happy ending。有的结局比现在还惨，」Sztybor说道。「有一个结局里，大卫并没有彻底死去。荒坂得到了他，最后他成了机器人，在非洲或南美的企业战争中拼杀。」

paragraphs.en: If you've not had a chance to see all 10 episodes of Cyberpunk: Edgerunners, you should know that the beautifully tragic tale of David Martinez never shied away from the brutality of Night City. It's a tearjerker from front to back, with his story (and many others) finally coming to an end at the hands of Adam Smasher as Lucy finally gets to take that trip to the moon.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你还没看过《赛博朋克：边缘行者》全部10集，那你应该知道，大卫·马丁内斯那段凄美的悲剧故事从不回避夜之城的残酷。整部剧从头哭到尾，他的故事（以及许多其他人的故事）最终终结在亚当·重锤手上，而露西也终于踏上了前往月球的旅程。

paragraphs.en: The ending to Cyberpunk: Edgerunners is bittersweet, to say the least. It's hard to imagine what it would have looked like without those final shots of Lucy looking down at Earth as Rosa Walton's "I Really Want to Stay at Your House" plays her out, but Sztybor suggests it nearly wasn't how the story came to a close.
paragraphs.cn: 《赛博朋克：边缘行者》的结局至少可以说是苦乐参半。很难想象，如果没有最后露西俯瞰地球时响起Rosa Walton的《I Really Want to Stay at Your House》那组画面，结局会是怎样，但Sztybor暗示，故事本可能不是这样收尾。

paragraphs.en: Of course, fans should note Sztybor teased there were worse "endings," suggesting the cut finale where David lives is just one of what could be many different moments that wound up on the cutting room floor. So, even if Season 1 made you cry, you can rest assured things could have been much, much sadder.
paragraphs.cn: 当然，粉丝们得注意，Sztybor透露的是更惨的「结局」们，这暗示被砍掉的大卫生还结局，可能只是众多被剪废弃方案中的一个。所以，即便第一季已经让你哭惨了，你也大可以放心，原本的剧情还能让人难过得多得多。

paragraphs.en: For now, the crew from Cyberpunk: Edgerunners Season 1 lives on as side content featured in Cyberpunk 2077 . A second season of the show is on the way but currently has no release date, with more expected to be revealed June 29 . A prequel manga starring Rebecca was also released back in February.
paragraphs.cn: 目前，《赛博朋克：边缘行者》第一季的角色们作为《赛博朋克2077》的支线内容继续活着。该剧第二季正在制作中，但目前尚未公布播出日期，更多信息预计将于6月29日公布。一部以丽贝卡为主角的前传漫画也已在2月发售。

translated_terms.I Really Want to Stay at Your House: 《I Really Want to Stay at Your House》
